case_title: MAXINE O. JONES RESPONDENT VS. BEDS AND BEDDING APPELLANT

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, NOV-01-2006: Respondent Maxine O. Jones appears in Propria Persona; Attorney at Law Seymour Seidscher, Esq. appears on behalf of Appellant Beds and Bedding with Ms. Elin Soon Ackland, a representative of appellant who is also present. The Clerk administers the oath to the parties, who also sign the stipulation and agree to a pro tem judge hearing the case this day.

The Court hears oral testimony presented by both sides and by witnesses who appear and receives documentary evidence for review. After hearing all oral evidence and after reading and reviewing all written exhibits in the cause, the Court takes the matter under submission.

Parties are informed by the Court they will receive the Court's decision in the mail; all exhibits ordered returned.

Judge Pro Tem Richard G. Grotch; Not reported; Clerk Marjorie Manzella (D-525).
